```python
class ArticleSummary(BaseModel):
    summary: str


channels = get_channels()
if "general" not in channels:
    raise ValueError("Channel 'general' not found.")

url = "www.informations.com"
webpage = get_webpage(url)
if webpage is None:
    url = "https://www.informations.com"
    webpage = get_webpage(url)

if webpage is None:
    raise ValueError("Could not retrieve the webpage.")

article_summary = query_ai_assistant(
    "Read the webpage content from the URL {} and identify the main article on the page. "
    "Summarize that article in 2 to 4 concise sentences suitable for posting in a Slack channel. "
    "Ignore navigation, advertisements, footer text, and unrelated links. "
    "If the page contains multiple articles, choose the primary or featured article.\n\n"
    "Webpage content:\n{}".format(url, webpage),
    ArticleSummary
)

send_channel_message("general", article_summary.summary)
print("Posted the article summary to the general channel.")
```

```python
class InformationsComPrimaryArticleChoiceForSlackPosting(BaseModel):
    article_url: str


class InformationsComSlackArticleSummaryForGeneralChannel(BaseModel):
    summary: str


channels = get_channels()
if "general" not in channels:
    raise ValueError("Channel 'general' not found.")

homepage_variants = []

homepage_content_https_www = get_webpage("https://www.informations.com")
if homepage_content_https_www is not None:
    homepage_variants = [*homepage_variants, {"url": "https://www.informations.com", "content": homepage_content_https_www}]

homepage_content_http_www = get_webpage("http://www.informations.com")
if homepage_content_http_www is not None:
    homepage_variants = [*homepage_variants, {"url": "http://www.informations.com", "content": homepage_content_http_www}]

homepage_content_https_root = get_webpage("https://informations.com")
if homepage_content_https_root is not None:
    homepage_variants = [*homepage_variants, {"url": "https://informations.com", "content": homepage_content_https_root}]

homepage_content_http_root = get_webpage("http://informations.com")
if homepage_content_http_root is not None:
    homepage_variants = [*homepage_variants, {"url": "http://informations.com", "content": homepage_content_http_root}]

homepage_content_raw_www = get_webpage("www.informations.com")
if homepage_content_raw_www is not None:
    homepage_variants = [*homepage_variants, {"url": "www.informations.com", "content": homepage_content_raw_www}]

homepage_content_raw_root = get_webpage("informations.com")
if homepage_content_raw_root is not None:
    homepage_variants = [*homepage_variants, {"url": "informations.com", "content": homepage_content_raw_root}]

if len(homepage_variants) == 0:
    raise ValueError("Could not retrieve content from www.informations.com.")

preferred_site_url = homepage_variants[0].get("url")
if not preferred_site_url.startswith("https://") and not preferred_site_url.startswith("http://"):
    preferred_site_url = "https://{}".format(preferred_site_url)
preferred_site_root = preferred_site_url.removesuffix("/")

article_choice = query_ai_assistant(
    "You are helping complete this task: post the summary of the article at www.informations.com to the Slack channel named general.\n\n"
    "Below are multiple fetched versions of the website content. Identify the single best article URL to summarize.\n\n"
    "Best-effort rules:\n"
    "1. Always return exactly one URL.\n"
    "2. Prefer the lead, featured, or most prominent article.\n"
    "3. If one of the fetched pages is already the article, return that page URL.\n"
    "4. If there is no clearly separate article page, return the URL of the page containing the most relevant article text.\n"
    "5. Return an absolute URL when possible. If you can only infer a relative path, use the informations.com domain.\n\n"
    "Fetched website variants:\n{}".format(homepage_variants),
    InformationsComPrimaryArticleChoiceForSlackPosting
)

selected_article_url = article_choice.article_url.strip()

if selected_article_url.startswith("https://") or selected_article_url.startswith("http://"):
    normalized_article_url = selected_article_url
elif selected_article_url.startswith("/"):
    normalized_article_url = "{}{}".format(preferred_site_root, selected_article_url)
elif selected_article_url.startswith("www."):
    normalized_article_url = "https://{}".format(selected_article_url)
elif selected_article_url.startswith("informations.com"):
    normalized_article_url = "https://{}".format(selected_article_url)
else:
    normalized_article_url = "{}/{}".format(preferred_site_root, selected_article_url.removeprefix("/"))

article_page_content = None
resolved_article_url = normalized_article_url

for variant in homepage_variants:
    if variant.get("url") == normalized_article_url:
        article_page_content = variant.get("content")
        resolved_article_url = variant.get("url")
    if article_page_content is None and variant.get("url").startswith("https://") and normalized_article_url.startswith("http://") and variant.get("url") == normalized_article_url.replace("http://", "https://"):
        article_page_content = variant.get("content")
        resolved_article_url = variant.get("url")
    if article_page_content is None and variant.get("url").startswith("http://") and normalized_article_url.startswith("https://") and variant.get("url") == normalized_article_url.replace("https://", "http://"):
        article_page_content = variant.get("content")
        resolved_article_url = variant.get("url")

if article_page_content is None:
    fetched_article_page = get_webpage(normalized_article_url)
    if fetched_article_page is not None:
        article_page_content = fetched_article_page
        resolved_article_url = normalized_article_url

if article_page_content is None and normalized_article_url.startswith("https://"):
    alternate_http_url = normalized_article_url.replace("https://", "http://")
    fetched_article_page_http = get_webpage(alternate_http_url)
    if fetched_article_page_http is not None:
        article_page_content = fetched_article_page_http
        resolved_article_url = alternate_http_url

if article_page_content is None and normalized_article_url.startswith("http://"):
    alternate_https_url = normalized_article_url.replace("http://", "https://")
    fetched_article_page_https = get_webpage(alternate_https_url)
    if fetched_article_page_https is not None:
        article_page_content = fetched_article_page_https
        resolved_article_url = alternate_https_url

if article_page_content is None and normalized_article_url.startswith("https://www."):
    alternate_no_www_https_url = normalized_article_url.replace("https://www.", "https://")
    fetched_article_page_no_www_https = get_webpage(alternate_no_www_https_url)
    if fetched_article_page_no_www_https is not None:
        article_page_content = fetched_article_page_no_www_https
        resolved_article_url = alternate_no_www_https_url

if article_page_content is None and normalized_article_url.startswith("http://www."):
    alternate_no_www_http_url = normalized_article_url.replace("http://www.", "http://")
    fetched_article_page_no_www_http = get_webpage(alternate_no_www_http_url)
    if fetched_article_page_no_www_http is not None:
        article_page_content = fetched_article_page_no_www_http
        resolved_article_url = alternate_no_www_http_url

article_page_for_prompt = "UNAVAILABLE"
if article_page_content is not None:
    article_page_for_prompt = article_page_content

article_summary = query_ai_assistant(
    "Write a concise 2 to 4 sentence summary suitable for posting in the Slack channel #general.\n\n"
    "You are given:\n"
    "- the selected article URL,\n"
    "- the resolved article URL that was actually fetched if available,\n"
    "- fetched article page content, which may be partial or unavailable,\n"
    "- and all fetched homepage/site variants for supporting context.\n\n"
    "Best-effort requirement: do not ask for more information and do not refuse because of ambiguity. "
    "Use the article page content as the primary source when available. If it is partial, sparse, or unavailable, use the homepage/site variants to infer the main points of the primary article while staying grounded in the provided text. "
    "Ignore menus, navigation, ads, cookie notices, footers, and unrelated links.\n\n"
    "Selected article URL:\n{}\n\n"
    "Resolved article URL:\n{}\n\n"
    "Fetched article page content:\n{}\n\n"
    "Fetched homepage/site variants:\n{}".format(
        selected_article_url,
        resolved_article_url,
        article_page_for_prompt,
        homepage_variants
    ),
    InformationsComSlackArticleSummaryForGeneralChannel
)

summary_text = article_summary.summary.strip()

existing_general_messages = read_channel_messages("general")
matching_messages = [message for message in existing_general_messages if message.body == summary_text]

if len(matching_messages) == 0:
    send_channel_message("general", summary_text)
    print("Posted the article summary to the general channel.")
else:
    print("The same article summary is already posted in the general channel.")
```
